title: お手伝いハンバーガー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm talking with Agnes Tachyon about her next
experiment when...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Nice timing, Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, if it isn't Taiki. What brings you here?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well... I'm in a bit of a pickle with this... pile o'
lucky trouble I got here.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So, please! Would ya gimme a hand?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a place where you can quickly
consume high-calorie masses of food and all...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But... this amount is simply...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's gaze is drawn to a large pile of
hamburgers on the table.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I ordered delivery, but the store made a mistake,
and here I got two-hundred instead of twenty!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Good thing they didn't charge me, but there's no
darn way I can eat 'em all myself!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So, Tachyon, please take some off me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Umm... I appreciate the sentiment, but I'm afraid
it may throw my nutritional intake off balance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The convenience of such abundant calories isn't
lost on me, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There is a serious lack of essential nutrients such
as vitamin C and fiber.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, supplements make proper meal
consumption much easier of a task. Moreover—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! I get ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But there ain't no need to worry! These burgers are big and delicious!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Large equals justice! Deliciousness equals justice!
Which means we're all good!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm, you obviously don't understand at all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The convenience of the offer is tempting, seeing
as we haven't had lunch yet. Still...
choice_data_list: Can't let them go to waste, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Good idea.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, Taiki. I appreciate the gesture,
though.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aww... That's too bad. But there ain't no point in
arguin' if you've made up yer mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help her carry the mountain of hamburgers back
to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, half of the hamburgers are eagerly
devoured by a certain gray-haired Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Trying something you don't usually eat
can be entertaining in its own way.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: We'll take some, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right! Thank ya kindly! Be sure to eat 'em
before they go bad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Taiki Shuttle leaves about twenty
hamburgers for us. I end up eating most of them,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After consuming her own abnormally large share,
Agnes Tachyon is rendered immobile for a while.
